scope_note: QA Dale Circle Cert family [189]: certifies Dale Pond's integer circle construction extending Iverson's QA. Three new elements: P=2W (diameter), Q=P (circumference=diameter in QA units), R=W² (area). Pi disappears in QA circular units. Source: svpwiki.com 'Quantum Arithmetic Elements' (1998). Checks DC_1+P/Q/R/W/SRC/WITNESS/F; 1 PASS + 1 FAIL; self-test ok
